summary: Roper's Application Software segment gains from SaaS demand, GenAI innovation and recurring revenue strength across key businesses.

headline: Figma’s Earnings Just Flipped the Narrative
summary: Figma (NYSE: FIG) has had one of the wildest post-IPO rides in recent memory. After debuting at $33 in July 2025, the stock soared to nearly $143 before crashing to around $20. That’s an 88% collapse from peak levels, despite the business itself continuing to grow rapidly.

headline: Autodesk's Value In An AI-Centered World
summary: Autodesk is a market leader in industrial and manufacturing design software, but current valuation does not offer upside. See why ADSK stock is a hold.
